steps.title: Count total cubes and favorable outcomes
steps.content: Total number of cubes: $8 + 4 + 36 + 36 = 84$. The cubes that are neither blue nor yellow are the red and white cubes: $8 + 4 = 12$ cubes.

steps.title: Calculate probability and simplify
steps.content:
Set up the probability fraction using favorable outcomes over total outcomes:
$$P = \frac{12}{84}$$
Simplify by dividing both numerator and denominator by 12:
$$P = \frac{1}{7}$$
That matches Choice D — $\frac{1}{7}$.
